mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in the federal funds rate directly raises the discount rate for equity valuations, compressing forward S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns show no statistically significant negative correlation with FEDFUNDS changes.

mechanism_narrative: When the CPIAUCSL index exceeds 285, market participants anticipate aggressive Federal Reserve tightening, triggering immediate equity sell-offs and negative forward returns.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 65% of triggered instances despite the threshold crossing, or out-of-sample accuracy drops below 52%.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in total nonfarm payrolls and a declining unemployment rate signal robust labor market expansion, boosting corporate earnings expectations and driving positive equity returns over a quarter.
failure_condition: Joint signal fails to outperform baseline by > 1.5% annualized over 3-year rolling windows, or interaction term loses statistical significance (p > 0.10) in multivariate regression.

mechanism_narrative: Rising retail sales indicate strong consumer spending power, which directly supports corporate revenue growth and generates positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Forward returns are negative in > 60% of periods following retail sales increases, or the signal predictive power vanishes during recovery phases.

mechanism_narrative: An upward trend in the index of industrial production reflects expanding manufacturing capacity and economic momentum, generating short-term positive equity returns within one week.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns show no significant positive correlation with INDPRO momentum, or Rank IC falls below 0.01 across all tested windows.

mechanism_narrative: When housing starts fall below 1600 thousand units, it signals a sharp contraction in construction demand and rising recession probability, causing negative forward equity returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: SPX delivers positive 60d returns in > 55% of triggered instances, or the threshold fails to separate bull and bear outcomes with statistical significance.

mechanism_narrative: The combination of rising federal funds rates and persistently high inflation creates negative real yields and tightens financial conditions, systematically suppressing S&P 500 forward returns over one month.
failure_condition: The interaction effect reverses sign during tightening cycles, or joint signal accuracy drops below 48% in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: A rising unemployment rate indicates deteriorating labor market conditions and weakening consumer demand, which reduces corporate profit forecasts and drives negative equity returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive in > 60% of periods following unemployment increases, or the signal loses predictive power specifically during recovery regimes.
